resources.string: Enter the full GitHub repository URL:
Select a repository to see details.
Save your tracked repositories to a JSON file
Load repositories from a previously exported JSON file

Git Tracker is a modern Android application designed to monitor GitHub repository releases. It features a resilient background synchronization system that automatically manages GitHub\'s API rate limits, ensuring you never miss a version update while preserving battery and data.

• **Automated Resilient Sync**: Intelligent 1-hour checks that adapt to GitHub rate limits.
• **Release-First Monitoring**: Focuses exclusively on official releases for high-quality metadata.
• **Offline-First Architecture**: Powered by Room database for instant access to release history.
• **Smart Quota Management**: Pre-sync quota checks to avoid unnecessary network calls.
• **Modern Adaptive UI**: A fluid Material 3 experience that scales across all device types.
